svg.title: The BEE Suite Director Dashboard Guide
svg.desc: Daily steps for running tuition, families, forms, attendance, staff, and parent follow-up from The BEE Suite.
svg.text: Daily steps for running tuition, families, forms, attendance, staff, and parent follow-up

g.text: Use this as the daily operating checklist before billing, drop-off, pickup, and closeout.
Confirm the family, invoice, amount, and payment method before submitting any tuition
confirm you are in the right
Search or open the family. Confirm
Go to Billing, select the family
or custom amount, then choose the

svg.text: Tuition payment options directors can use today

g.text: Charge the parent's stored debit or credit card
for total balance, invoice amount, or a custom
Take card details over the phone using Stripe's
secure card entry page. Do not type card numbers
Send the parent a branded checkout link when
they need to pay from their own phone or
Send instant bank login verification if ACH is
pending, or use verified ACH when it is ready.
Use Documents for family, child, staff, signature, upload,
Use Parent Portal invites for parents who need login
Use Required Checklist to see missing forms, rejected
Use Messages and Announcements for parent communication
Use Kiosk and Attendance to confirm check-in/out, pickup
How do I get tuition paid today?
Use saved card, Open Card Terminal, or send a card payment
link. Use ACH only when verified.
ACH is still pending. What now?
Send Instant Bank verification, or have the parent pay by
Can I charge a card on file?
Yes, when the family has a saved Stripe card and the
Can I process a custom amount?
Yes. Select the family, choose custom amount, confirm the
reason, then process the selected method.
How do I avoid billing the wrong family?
Open the family record first, verify guardian and child
names, invoice number, balance, and amount before
Where do I see payment history?
Open the family billing area to view invoices, ledger
entries, payments, balance, and reconciliation status.
Send a payment link or portal invite. The kiosk also shows
balance and a parent portal pay link after PIN/QR lookup.
Are card and bank numbers stored here?
No. Stripe handles sensitive payment entry. The BEE Suite
stores only safe payment labels and reconciliation data.
